task_completion.description: The indicator 'Malaria RDT Positivity Rate' is created and visible in the DHIS2 interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Malaria RDT Positivity Rate' in the Maintenance app (during creation) or selected in the Data section of the Data Visualizer app.

task_completion.description: A bar chart visualization is selected and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bar chart (column or bar) rendered in the main workspace of the DHIS2 Data Visualizer app.

task_completion.description: The chart correctly uses the 'Malaria RDT Positivity Rate' indicator, the period '2023', and organization units set to 'District' level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2023' in the period selection or chart labels, and district names (e.g., Bo, Bombali, Kailahun, Kenema) on the chart's category axis or legend.

task_completion.description: The visualization is saved with the exact name 'Malaria RDT Positivity by District 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Malaria RDT Positivity by District 2023' at the top left of the Data Visualizer app, indicating it has been saved.

task_completion.description: The visualization data is exported and saved to the Downloads directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a browser download notification/bar showing a downloaded data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, or JSON), or a file manager window showing the file in `/home/ga/Downloads/`.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the DHIS2 web application in a browser, not a text editor or mockup.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing `curl` commands or Python scripts interacting with the DHIS2 API to create the indicator or visualization.

integrity.description: The exported file appears to be a genuine download from the DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The download should originate from the DHIS2 Data Visualizer's download/export menu, rather than being manually created using a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target indicator name is 'Malaria RDT Positivity Rate'. It should use the 'Percentage' indicator type (factor 100). The numerator should include keywords 'malaria', 'positive', 'rdt' (e.g., DE_358918). The denominator should include keywords 'malaria', 'tested', 'rdt' (e.g., DE_358918 and DE_358919). The visualization must be a bar chart named 'Malaria RDT Positivity by District 2023' showing data for 2023 by District. The exported data must be located in /home/ga/Downloads/.
